structurePatterns: Cards have NO border and NO shadow in resting state — Aham is flat
Background = white (tier1) on white page; panel (tier2) on panel page
Selected state = flat gray background (tier3-line #E7E7E7), NOT blue
Concentric radius: child radius = parent radius - padding gap
usageHints: Cards separate by whitespace, never by borders or shadows
One primary action per card maximum
Card title uses body style (14px semibold) or lg (17px) for prominent cards
doNotInvent: Card borders, outlines, or shadows — Aham cards are flat
Blue selection state — selected = flat gray (tier3-line)
